title: Chocolate Bark
instructions: Step 1. Melt the chocolate in a double boiler or in the microwave in short intervals, stirring until completely smooth.
Step 2. Pour the melted chocolate onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and spread it into an even layer.
Step 3. Immediately sprinkle the Yummi Pops Sal Marina, pressing lightly so they adhere, and finish with a touch of flaky sea salt.
Step 4. Let cool at room temperature or refrigerate until the chocolate is firm. Break into irregular pieces and serve.
